remember: Students will be able to recall the events that triggered the crisis of the constitutional order in India.
Students will be able to identify the key features of the crisis of the constitutional order.
Students will be able to list the causes and consequences of the crisis of the constitutional order.
understand: Students will be able to explain the reasons behind the breakdown of the constitutional order in India.
Students will be able to describe the role of various factors in the crisis of the constitutional order.
Students will be able to compare and contrast the different perspectives on the crisis of the constitutional order.
apply: Students will be able to apply the concepts of crisis of the constitutional order to analyze a given situation.
Students will be able to use the knowledge of the crisis of the constitutional order to evaluate the impact of a particular event on the political system.
analyze: Students will be able to analyze the complex factors that contributed to the crisis of the constitutional order.
Students will be able to evaluate the strengths and weaknesses of different explanations of the crisis of the constitutional order.

ncert_objectives: Explain the causes and consequences of the crisis of the constitutional order in India.
Describe the role of emergency provisions in the Constitution in the crisis of the constitutional order.
Discuss the impact of the crisis of the constitutional order on the political system of India.
board_exam_objectives: What is the crisis of the constitutional order in India? Explain its causes and consequences.
Explain the role of emergency provisions in the Constitution in the crisis of the constitutional order.
How did the crisis of the constitutional order affect the political system of India?
